title: Arizona State Parks and Trails Goes Live With Reservation and Call Center Solution from Tyler Technologies
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced that Arizona State Parks and Trails has gone live with a reservation and call center platform from Tyler Technologies.

title: Tyler (TYL) & Vermont Extend Payment Service Deal for 3 Years
text: Tyler's (TYL) NIC extends its 16-year relationship with Vermont and is likely to continue to provide more than 150 services and payment processing solutions to state government agencies.

title: Tyler Technologies Extends Contract for Digital Government and Payment Solutions in the State of Vermont
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced that the state of Vermont has extended its contract for Tyler's digital government and payments services.

title: NIC State Partners Receive 2022 Government Experience Awards from the Center for Digital Government
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced that NIC's state partners received numerous 2022 Government Experience Awards from the Center for Digital Government.

title: 4 Business-Software Services Stocks to Watch in a Challenging Industry
text: The Zacks Business-Software Services industry players like MSCI, TYL, SNX and GWRE are poised to continue benefiting from the increasing demand for multi-cloud-enabled software solutions amid an accelerated digital transformation and a shift to cloud initiatives.

title: Tyler's (TYL) Public Safety Suite Selected by Putnam County
text: The implementation of Tyler's (TYL) comprehensive Enterprise Public Safety suite is likely to help the Putnam County Sheriff's Office improve operations, increase efficiency and streamline communication.

title: Putnam County, New York, Selects Tyler's Enterprise Public Safety Software Suite
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced that the Putnam County Sheriff's Office in New York has selected Tyler's Enterprise Public Safety suite.
